",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        max_lr=LEARNING_RATE,\\n        total_steps=total_steps,\\n        pct_start=0.1,\\n        anneal_strategy=\\\"cos\\\",\\n        div_factor=10.0,\\n        final_div_factor=100.0,\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Enable a budget-aware one-cycle schedule and switch to AdamW with slightly stronger regularization and a higher base LR; this is the smallest change likely to help most under a fixed-step budget.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"topk\"]}"}}
